title: carduus × atacinus
intro: Carduus × atacinus, also known as the hybrid cardoon, is a cross between the cardoon (Cynara cardunculus) and the artichoke thistle (Cirsium artemisiifolium). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Carduus × atacinus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infuse in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
